name: JISULIFE Portable Handheld Fan Ultra2
description: 9000mAh battery with up to 25 hrs of runtime, 100 speed settings, built-in 18W power bank, flashlight, and metal shell. A must-have for staying cool at festivals.

name: SenseCAP Card Tracker T1000-E
description: Credit card-sized Meshtastic tracker — only 6.5mm thick. GPS, IP65 waterproof, 700mAh battery, and up to 10km range. Track your squad across the festival grounds without cell service.

name: K-MingleSo Portable Folding Stool
description: Lightweight 1.7 lb camping stool with a 13" seat height and 450 lb capacity. 600D Oxford fabric, steel frame, built-in side pocket, and carry bag included. Perfect for long festival sets.
